instructions.addingDocuments: Place open-license math references in the appropriate subfolder. Update this index.json with document metadata.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from MIT OCW, OpenStax, public domain sources, or university lecture notes with open licenses.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear filenames like: calculus_limits_openstax.pdf, linear_algebra_mit_ocw.pdf
instructions.licenseCompliance: Only include documents with explicit open licenses or public domain status.
